item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, January 2021 | Mann ki Baat 73rd Episode
item.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke on a wide range of subjects. PM Modi highlighted India's largest covid vaccination programme and said that it was a symbol of the country's self-reliance. Speaking about road safety, PM Modi said that many efforts were being made for road safety at the individual and collective level. He also condemned the violence that took place on 26th January in Delhi.

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, February 2021 | Mann ki Baat 74th Episode
item.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi, while highlighting the innovative spirit among the country's youth to become self-reliant, said, "Aatmanirbhar Bharat has become a national spirit." PM Modi praised efforts of individuals from across the country for their innovations, plantation and biodiversity conservation in Assam. He also shared a unique sports commentary in Sanskrit.

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, May 2021 | Mann ki Baat 77th Episode
item.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke about the recent cyclones that hit the west and east coast and assured Centre’s full support to the affected states. PM Modi applauded the frontline workers combating corona, Railways and the Armed Forces for helping in transportation of liquid medical oxygen. PM Modi also spoke about the government marking seven years and said, in all these years, we worked as 'Team India'.

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, June 2021 | Mann ki Baat 78th Episode
item.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke on several subjects including the upcoming Tokyo Olympics, remembered Late Milkha Singh and his contribution. PM Modi shed light on the ongoing vaccination campaign and said it can be a case study for the world. He spoke to people residing in the rural areas and urged them not to fall prey to any rumours and to take the vaccine. The PM also mentioned about importance of water conservation, Amrut Mahotsav and more.

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, December 2021 | Mann ki Baat 84th Episode
item.description:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, December 2021
In the final Mann Ki Baat of 2021, PM Modi highlighted India’s vaccination journey, Azadi Ka Amrit Mahotsav, emphasised the importance of book reading as well as mentioned about air gun surrender campaign in Arunachal Pradesh. PM Modi extensively spoke about Swachhata and urged the countrymen to take it forward. He urged the citizens to welcome 2022 on a positive note with the aim of making India Aatmanirbhar.

item.description:
#mannkibaat #pmmodimannkibaat #narendramodi During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke at length about the historic achievement of $400 billion goods exports and one lakh crore worth order value through GeM portal. He shared stories of Padma awardees, water warriors and cleanliness champions.

item.description:

During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi paid tributes to Shaheed Udham Singh and other greats who sacrificed their lives for the country. The PM shared unique facts about Indian Railways, spoke at length about the potential of our country's youth as well as highlighted about various fairs, AYUSH initiatives and toy exports.

item.description:

During Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi extended Chhath Puja greetings to the countrymen. The PM spoke extensively about the growing use of solar energy. The PM also spoke about the milestones India has been achieving in the space sector, paid tributes to Bhagwan Birsa Munda, and more!

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, December 2022 | Mann ki Baat 96th Episode
item.description:
#MannKiBaat #MKBDecember2022 #PMModiMannKiBaat #MKB
During the final Mann Ki Baat of the year, Prime Minister Narendra Modi highlighted India's best moments from 2022. He said that the year 2022 will be remembered for people adopting the resolution of 'Self-reliant India'. He spoke at length about focusing on evidence-based medicine, yoga and Ayurveda. The PM also paid rich tributes to former PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee and shared achievements of citizens from across the country.

item.description:
#MannKiBaat #MKBMarch2023 #PMModiMannKiBaat #MKB #99thMKB
In the 99th episode of 'Mann Ki Baat', Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke about rising awareness regarding organ donation and highlighted a policy being worked on towards streamlining the processes related to it. item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, June 2023 | Mann ki Baat 102nd Episode
item.description:
#MannKiBaat #MKBJune2023 #PMModiMannKiBaat #MKB
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi praised the resilience of the people of Kutch, highlighting their response to a recent cyclone and the district's growth after the 2001 earthquake. He discussed the goal of making India T.B. free by 2025 and applauded the efforts of Ni-kshay Mitras. He also spoke about the dark days of Emergency and reminisced how the supporters of democracy were tortured during that time.

item.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, July 2023 | Mann ki Baat 103rd Episode
item.description:
#MannKiBaat #MKBJuly2023 #PMModiMannKiBaat #MKB
In the 103rd episode of Mann Ki Baat, PM Narendra Modi touched on many vital subjects. From monsoon to Amrit Mahotsav, the holy month of Sawan to India getting back its ancient artefacts, the PM discussed a multitude of topics. The Prime Minister also focussed on campaigns across the country against drug abuse as well as the soon to be launched ‘Meri Mati Mera Desh’ campaign to honour India’s martyred heroes.

प्रधानमंत्री नरेन्द्र मोदी हर महीने के आखिरी रविवार को सुबह 11 बजे 'मन की बात' रेडियो कार्यक्रम के माध्यम से जनता से संवाद करते हैं। पीएम मोदी का 'मन की बात' कार्यक्रम आकाशवाणी (All India Radio) से प्रसारित होता है। आज 'मन की बात' में पीएम मोदी देश के विभिन्न राज्यों के नागरिकों के सुझावों और सवालों पर चर्चा भी करेंगे। पीएम मोदी ने तीन अक्टूबर 2014 को विजयादशमी के दिन 'मन की बात' कार्यक्रम की यात्रा शुरू की थी। 30 अप्रैल 2023 को पीएम मोदी के 'मन की बात'कार्यक्रम का 100वां एपिसोड प्रसारित हुआ था। आज 'मन की बात'की बात का 104वां एपिसोड प्रसारित हो रहा है।
Listen: Mann ki baat Ep 104 Chapters-
0:00 Mann ki baat starting 1:42 Chandrayaan 3 Mission Success Story and Women led development 08:30 Conversation with medal winners in World University Games 2023, China 18:15 New record on Har Ghar Tiranga Abhiyaan 22:17 On mother tongue and Telugu Language Day 23:36 On Shri Dhanapal ji and Bengaluru Darshini 26:07 On Brian D. Kharpran of Megalaya and his contribution to Speleology. 27:43 On Innovative dairy movement of Gujarat, Uttar Pradesh and Kerala

item.title: PM Narendra Modi Mann Ki Baat with Nation | Mann ki Baat 105th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
During ‘Mann Ki Baat’, PM Modi highlighted Chandrayaan-3’s successful landing and India’s hosting of the G20 summit. PM Modi discussed World Tourism Day, India’s tourism industry and the importance of cultural exploration. He shared inspiring stories of contributions in education and wildlife conservation. The PM also encouraged buying locally-made products during the festive season, promoting ‘Vocal for Local.’

item.title: PM Narendra Modi's Mann Ki Baat with Nation | Mann ki Baat 106th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
During ‘Mann Ki Baat’ address, Prime Minister Modi drew attention to the notable rise in Khadi sales and underscored the significance of endorsing the ‘Vocal for Local’ initiative. Additionally, he spoke about ‘MYBharat,’ a youth-focused organisation. PM Modi commended India’s achievements in the Para Asian Games and Special Olympics and offered heartfelt tributes to Sardar Patel, tribal leaders, and Mirabai.

item.title: PM Narendra Modi's Mann Ki Baat LIVE: 107th Episode with the Nation
item.description:
Mann Ki Baat LIVE | Prime Minister Narendra Modi addresses the nation through the 107th Mann ki Baat. Among the various things he also spoke in great detail about the relevance of the day of 26th November, which often remember as the Constitution Day and also the fateful day when the terror attacks of 26/11 had occurred.

item.title: PM Narendra Modi's Mann Ki Baat LIVE: 108th Episode with the Nation
item.description:
In the 108th ‘Mann Ki Baat’ episode, PM Modi highlighted India's achievements, including the Nari Shakti Vandan Act and economic growth. Messages on fitness from Sadhguru, Harmanpreet Kaur, Viswanathan Anand, Akshay Kumar and Rishabh Malhotra were featured. The PM emphasized mental health, showcased health startups, and discussed about Bhashini, the AI for real-time translation. He also paid tribute to Savitribai Phule and Rani Velu Nachiyar.

item.description:
During the 110th episode of ‘Mann Ki Baat,’ PM Narendra Modi highlighted women’s achievements, drone technology and wildlife conservation efforts. He spoke to ‘Namo Drone Didi’ Sunita Devi and Kalyani Patil, who practices organic farming. The PM applauded the Election Commission for its ‘Mera Pehla Vote – Desh Ke Liye’ campaign and urged first time voters to exercise their franchise in the upcoming Lok Sabha elections.

item.title: Mann Ki Baat Live: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with Nation | 111th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In the 111th episode of ‘Mann Ki Baat,’ Prime Minister Modi expressed joy at reconnecting with the nation post-election, celebrated India's democratic spirit, highlighted the significance of 'Hul Diwas,' and introduced campaigns like ‘Ek Ped Maa Ke Naam.’ He also discussed global appreciation for Indian culture, the upcoming Paris Olympics and local entrepreneurial successes.

item.title: Mann Ki Baat Live: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with Nation | 112th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In the latest 'Mann Ki Baat' episode, PM Modi expressed pride in India's athletes competing in the Paris Olympics and the students who excelled in the International Mathematics Olympiad. He spoke in detail about the Moidams of Assam which have been included in the UNESCO World Heritage list recently. He highlighted the rising popularity of Khadi, the enthusiasm for the 'Har Ghar Tiranga Abhiyan,' and the country's successful tiger conservation efforts. He also mentioned about 'MANAS,' a new initiative to combat drug abuse.

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 113th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In 113th episode of Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Modi highlighted India's achievements, including the first National Space Day and advancements by the spacetech start-up GalaxEye. He lauded community initiatives in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh for wildlife protection, celebrated Madhya Pradesh’s Jhabua for its innovative ‘waste to wealth’ approach, and emphasized the significance of toy recycling. The Prime Minister also highlighted the importance of Nutrition Month, urging collective efforts to ensure children receive adequate nutrition.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi #modi #allindiaradio

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 115th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In this month's Mann Ki Baat episode, Prime Minister Modi reflected on memorable moments, particularly his visit to Jharkhand's Ulihatu village on Bhagwan Birsa Munda's Jayanti. He emphasised the importance of celebrating the 150th anniversaries of Sardar Patel and Birsa Munda, encouraging citizen participation. The PM also discussed India's progress in animation, self-reliance and fitness. The PM also cautioned against various digital arrest frauds.

item.description:
